## 10. Generation Notes

- Generated by `generate_database_comprehensive.py`.
- Output is written as UTF-8 markdown to avoid Windows console codepage corruption.
- The document reflects Oracle metadata available through `ALL_*` views for the supplied login.
- To target a different schema, rerun the batch file with `--owners OWNER_NAME` or edit the owner list in the launcher.
